testcase.name: test_korotkevich_flags_range_len

failure.message: AssertionError: no korotkevich in {'korotkevich': True, 'torvalds': True, 'carmack': True, 'hamilton': True, 'ritchie': True, 'score': 5, 'language': 'python', 'issues': [{'master': 'korotkevich', 'line': 3, 'message': 'for i in range(len(x)) - use enumerate() or iterate directly', 'severity': 'warning'}], 'masters': [{'key': 'korotkevich', 'label': 'Efficiency', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'torvalds', 'label': 'Error Handling', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'carmack', 'label': 'Performance', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'hamilton', 'label': 'Fault Tolerance', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'ritchie', 'label': 'Clarity', 'passed': True}]} assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gauntlet_devspace.py:125: in test_korotkevich_flags_range_len assert kor is not None, f"no korotkevich in {rep}" E AssertionError: no korotkevich in {'korotkevich': True, 'torvalds': True, 'carmack': True, 'hamilton': True, 'ritchie': True, 'score': 5, 'language': 'python', 'issues': [{'master': 'korotkevich', 'line': 3, 'message': 'for i in range(len(x)) - use enumerate() or iterate directly', 'severity': 'warning'}], 'masters': [{'key': 'korotkevich', 'label': 'Efficiency', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'torvalds', 'label': 'Error Handling', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'carmack', 'label': 'Performance', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'hamilton', 'label': 'Fault Tolerance', 'passed': True}, {'key': 'ritchie', 'label': 'Clarity', 'passed': True}]} E assert None is not None
